chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P.No.D-549 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 25.06.2025 Petitioners present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w SIP Aijaz Ahmed, S.H.O. P.S. Shah Latif Town, Malir, Karachi. ------ Mr. Rashid Ali Tunio, advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, which is taken on record. He submits that petitioner No.1 is wife of respondent No.7 and she in violation of sharia law has contracted second marriage with petitioner No.2 (Abdul Ghaffar) through alleged freewill. When confronted, petitioner No.1 present in person, submits that respondent No.7 had already divorced her on 06.04.2025 and thereafter she being sui-juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 (Abdul Ghaffar) with her own freewill and further submits that nobody has abducted her. The Investigating Officer, present in the Court, has recorded her statement wherein she has reiterated that her ex-husband had divorced her on 06.04.2025 and now she wants to live with her present husband, petitioner No.2, hence protection may be provided to them. The Investigating Officer is directed to record the statement of the complainant as well and by considering the statement of petitioner No.1 conduct appropriate enquiry regarding alleged divorce dated 06.04.2025, prepare report in terms of Section 173 Cr.P.C and place it before the concerned Magistrate for appropriate orders in accordance with law. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. The official respondents are directed that during the intervening period, they shall provide due protection to petitioners strictly in accordance with law.

Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. The official respondents are directed that during the intervening period, they shall provide due protection to petitioners strictly in accordance with law. Judge Judge Manzoor
